name: storm-research
description: Perspective-driven, outline-first long-form research (Stanford STORM): multi-perspective research conversations, an evidence-grounded outline, a sectioned cited article, and a deterministic citation audit.

interface.longDescription: Research a topic from distinct perspectives, synthesize an evidence-grounded long-form report, and audit its citations.
defaultPrompt: Research this topic with STORM and produce a cited report.
